templates.title: General protocol skeleton
templates.description: Blank lab-protocol scaffold: materials, steps, notes, and safety sections ready to fill in.

templates.title: Q5 high-fidelity PCR setup
templates.description: 25 uL Q5 reaction recipe plus a 3-step cycling program with a 60 C anneal.

templates.title: Colony PCR screen
templates.description: Taq-based 20 uL colony-screen reaction with an extended initial denaturation to lyse cells.

templates.title: Reverse-phase peptide LC gradient
templates.description: C18 5-to-95% acetonitrile gradient with 0.1% formic acid for LC-MS peptide separation.

templates.title: 96-well dose-response layout
templates.description: Pre-labeled 96-well plate: column 1 blanks, column 2 vehicle controls, columns 3-12 samples.

templates.title: HEK293 passaging schedule
templates.description: Adherent HEK293 maintenance in DMEM + 10% FBS with a 1:6 split every 3 days.

templates.title: Western blot (SDS-PAGE + transfer)
templates.description: SDS-PAGE separation, wet transfer, blocking, and ECL detection steps as editable markdown.
